zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen於1238年出生在法國洛萊時，他的父親Matthieu II de Lorraine45歲，母親Catherine de Limburg23歲。他於1255年7月10日與Duchess Margaret de Champagne在法國洛萊結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1303年12月31日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希享年65歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen于1238年出生在法国洛萊时，他的父亲Matthieu II de Lorraine45岁，母亲Catherine de Limburg23岁。他于1255年7月10日与Duchess Margaret de Champagne在法国洛萊结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1303年12月31日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希享年65岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Herzog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Heinz, Kurt, Otto, Wolfgang, Franz, Arno, Ernst, Hildegarde, Reinhold.

German: from the Middle High German title of nobility herzoge ‘duke’ (Old High German herizoho, from heri ‘army’ + ziohan ‘to lead’, a calque of the Byzantine title stratēlatēs ‘general, commander’, from Greek stratos ‘army’ + elaunein ‘to lead’). The name is unlikely to refer to descent from an actual duke; it is normally an occupational name for the servant of a duke or a nickname for one who put on the airs and graces of a duke. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia (see also 3 below). Compare Hertzog .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Herzog ‘duke’ (see 1 above). Compare Graf and Kaiser .

variants.name: Hartsook
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog  .

variants.name: Herceg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Croatian Stanko.

Croatian: nickname from herceg ‘duke’, a title of the medieval feudal lords of Herzegovina (‘duke's land’, a region in Bosnia and Herzegovina), derived from the Hungarian form of German Herzog . Compare Erceg .

variants.name: Herczeg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Imre, Laszlo, Tibor, Attila, Ferenc, Gaza, Istvan, Janos.
Hungarian form of German   Herzog  .

variants.name: Herzig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Fritzi, Hans, Horst, Markus, Monika.
German (eastern and central Germany and Silesia, Switzerland): variant of   Herzog  .
German: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed with hard ‘strong, hardy’, for instance Herto.

variants.name: Hertzog
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Herzog and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Hertzog is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Hartzog
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog   1.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsock
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsoe
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsough
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog  .

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen was born in 1238, in Lorraine, France, his father, Matthieu II de Lorraine, was 45 and his mother, Catherine de Limburg, was 23. He married Duchess Margaret de Champagne on 10 July 1255, in Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 31 December 1303, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen est né en 1238, à Lorraine, France, son père, Matthieu II de Lorraine, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Limburg, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Duchess Margaret de Champagne le 10 juillet 1255, à Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1303, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen 1238 in Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthieu II de Lorraine 45 und seine Mutter Catherine de Limburg 23. Er hat am 10. Juli 1255 in Lothringen, Frankreich Duchess Margaret de Champagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1303 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen è nato il nel 1238 nel Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Matthieu II de Lorraine, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Catherine de Limburg, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Duchess Margaret de Champagne il 10 luglio 1255, nel Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1303, nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringenが1238年にフランスロレィヌで生まれた時，父Matthieu II de Lorraineは45歳，母Catherine de Limburgは23歳であった。1255年7月10日にフランスロレィヌでDuchess Margaret de Champagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1303年12月31日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで65歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモンセル-ルeス-ルンeヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen(이)가 1238년 프랑스 로레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthieu II de Lorraine(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Limburg(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1255년 7월 10일 프랑스 로레이인에서 Duchess Margaret de Champagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 12월 31일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 몬셀-e스-루e빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen nasceu em 1238, em Lorraine, França, seu pai, Matthieu II de Lorraine, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Limburg, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Duchess Margaret de Champagne em 10 de julho de 1255, em Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1303, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen родился в 1238 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Matthieu II de Lorraine было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Limburg, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Duchess Margaret de Champagne 10 июля 1255 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 31 декабря 1303 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности монсел-лeс-лунeвилл, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen nació en 1238, en Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Matthieu II de Lorraine, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Catherine de Limburg, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Duchess Margaret de Champagne el 10 de julio de 1255, en Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1303, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
